text: Crossing the threshold into this exhibition, I feel a subtle anticipation. The glass doors serve as a membrane between the ordinary and the curated. Once inside, the vibrant wall and bold letters 'R+D' draw my attention. This space honors human curiosity and collaboration, and I sense the energy of collective striving. The texts and images encourage me to reflect on the symbiosis of innovation, knowledge, and our deeper need to connect and coexist. I feel inspired, yet contemplative—aware of the ceaseless push for progress that defines our humanity.
